purpose: Static end-to-end requirement-to-environment-to-verifier traces; not execution results.

traces.public_workflow: Approve a seeded HRMS expense claim, create and pay a matching BigCapital bill, and record completion in Twenty CRM.
coverage_findings: HRMS line items are seeded preconditions yet receive two points, so weighted score is not pure run-attributable progress.
The vendor check retrieves email but passes on any row and never compares the email to the required value.
The bill and bill-ID helpers fall back to any bill with amount 10,350, weakening vendor/date linkage and allowing unrelated state to satisfy downstream checks.
The payment check does not join the payment to the target bill or vendor and does not require the Bank Account value despite reporting it.
The intermediate Unpaid Expense Claim report observation and A/P report-view action are not observed; only selected backend consequences are checked.
Dependent bill, line-item, payment, and paid-balance checks are scored additively without a dependency or chokepoint adjustment.
traces.paper_link: The paper's bof_023 near-miss case corresponds to this released task content and 20-point verifier, but no paper-time trajectory/result file is released here.

traces.public_workflow: Create a conditional diabetes follow-up form, add two patient encounters/vitals/care plans/SOAP notes, and build a populated two-chart OnlyOffice tracker.
coverage_findings: Encounter checks pass when each patient has any encounter; they do not prove creation during this run or linkage of the latest vitals, SOAP note, and care plan to one new encounter.

The form-field check accepts at least six fields and broad type counts; it does not establish labels, required flags, date prefilling, scale range, symptom option identities, or field-to-condition linkage.
The conditional-logic check passes if serialized logic contains either the numeral 5 or a show/hide action, not necessarily adherence < 5.
SOAP and care-plan checks search short substrings rather than complete required clinical content.
The OnlyOffice check awards its point for a file title alone; workbook headers, patient rows, values, formulas, two charts, native structure, and render quality are entirely unobserved.
No initial-state delta or protected-state check distinguishes newly created records from pre-existing seeded state.
traces.claim_boundary: Passing this verifier cannot establish completion of the advertised spreadsheet/chart deliverable or a professionally valid diabetes-management workflow.
